addV4LPLiquidity(address,uint256,uint256.details: Called by TaxProcessor to reinvest LP-share tax revenue.      Tokens must be transferred to Portal before calling this function.      Portal (as lock owner) calls increaseLiquidity on the GoPlus/UNCX locker      for both the quote-only (lower) and token-only (upper) positions.

params.quoteAmount: Amount of quote token available for LP
params.tokenAmount: Amount of protocol token available for LP

auditorRunIdempotent().details: Only callable by AUDITOR_ROLE or DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE.      Each internal fix block must be self-contained and idempotent — running this      function N times must have exactly the same net effect as running it once.      When a new hotfix is needed, add a clearly commented block inside the      implementation rather than creating a new privileged method, so that the      attack-surface introduced by dangerous one-shot functions stays minimal.

burnStuckTaxToken(address).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Supports V1 (TOKEN_TAXED) tax tokens.

params.taxToken: The address of the V1 tax token to burn stuck tokens for

params.minAmount: The minimum amount of tokens to buy
params.recipient: The address to send the token to
params.token: The address of the token to buy

buyOnCreation(address,address,uint256).details: This function is mainly for internal use (be delegated called from the portal contract)       The msg.value can be greater than inputAmount, the excess ETH will not be       refunded to the caller. They will be charged as a fee.       Note: the slippage is not checked in this function.

params.inputAmount: The amount of ETH to spend
params.recipient: The address to send the token to
params.token: The address of the token to buy

claim(address).details: Only the beneficiary of the token can call this function.

returns.tokenAmount: The amount of the token claimed

collectV4Fees(address).details: Can be called by anyone (permissionless keeper). The Locker's collectAddress is      set to Portal, so fees always flow through Portal → TaxProcessor → distribution.

params.token: The token whose LP fees to collect

commitNewTokenV5((bytes32,uint16,string,.details: This deploys the token contract and initializes it. The token must have been staged first via stageNewTokenV5.      The salt and isTaxToken in params must match what was used during staging.      If taxRate > 0, creates FlapTaxTokenV2, otherwise creates regular token. FIXME: this is not enabled in this version. Will be available once the audit for this part is ready.

params.params: The parameters for token deployment (includes salt to identify staged token)

delegateClaim(address).details: Only the roller or default admin can call this function. The claimed fee will be sent to the beneficiary of the token.

returns.quoteAmount: The amount of quote token (or ETH) claimed
returns.tokenAmount: The amount of the token claimed

returns.enabled: True if tax on bonding curve is enabled

excludeAddressFromDividends(address,addr.details: Only callable by AUDITOR_ROLE. The excluded address must be a non-EOA contract      and must not be an EIP-7702 delegated EOA.

params.account: The address to exclude from dividends.

returns.buyFeeRate: The current buy fee rate in basis points (e.g. 200 = 2%)
returns.sellFeeRate: The current sell fee rate in basis points (e.g. 200 = 2%)

getLockedSaltsByUserAndVersion(address,u.details: Only locks made from v5.11.0 onwards are present; pre-upgrade locks are not indexed.      `limit` is capped at 100.

params.limit: Maximum number of entries to return (capped at 100).
params.offset: Zero-based start index within the user+version set.
params.tokenVersion: The TokenVersion (as uint8) to filter on.

returns.total: The total number of salts in the on-chain index for this user and version.

getLockedSaltsCountByUserAndVersion(addr.details: Only locks made from v5.11.0 onwards are present; pre-upgrade locks are not indexed.

params.tokenVersion: The TokenVersion (as uint8) to filter on.

returns.count: The number of salts in the on-chain index for this user and version.

returns.locks: The lock ids of the token

params.quoteToken: The address of the quote token

returns.config: The configuration of the quote token

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {AccessControl-_setRoleAdmin}.

returns.state: The state of the token (V4) with only 'r' curve parameter
The state of the token (V5) with all curve parameters (r, h, k)
The state of the token (V6) with all V5 fields plus taxRate, pool, and progress
The state of the token (V7) with all V6 fields plus lpFeeProfile
The state of the token (V8) with asymmetric buyTaxRate and sellTaxRate

getTokenV8Safe(address).details: Returns enum-typed fields (TokenStatus, TokenVersion, V3LPFeeProfile, DEXId) as uint8      instead of their Solidity enum types, preventing ABI-decoding reverts when new enum      variants are introduced. Use this method when you need forward/backward compatibility      with future contract upgrades that may add new enum values.

returns.state: The state of the token with enum fields encoded as uint8

getTokenV9Safe(address).details: Same safety guarantees as getTokenV8Safe (enums returned as uint8).      Additionally exposes bondingCurveFeeRate introduced by newTokenV7.      For tokens created before newTokenV7, the new field will be 0.

returns.state: The state of the token with enum fields encoded as uint8 plus V7 fields

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role.

halt().details: This function is used to pause the protocol

returns._0: True if the address is blocked

lockSalt(bytes32,uint8).details: The caller must pass the `tokenVersion` they intend to lock for.         Accepted values: TOKEN_V3_PERMIT (7) for V7 non-tax tokens (NON_TAX_TOKEN_SUFFIX         vanity requirement, typically 0x8888) and TOKEN_TAXED_V3 (6) for tax tokens         (TAX_TOKEN_SUFFIX vanity requirement, typically 0x7777). Any other value         reverts with UnsupportedTokenVersion.         Fee is forwarded to FEE_RECEIVER.  Emits FlapSaltLocked.

params.tokenVersion: Token version to lock for. Must be TOKEN_V3_PERMIT or TOKEN_TAXED_V3.

newTokenV2((string,string,string,uint8,b.details: due to the implementation limit, when creating a tax token and using an ERC20 token as the quote token, You need to pay an extra 1gwei native gas token (i.e msg.value = 1 gwei), or you will encounter an InsufficientValueForTaxTokenCreation error

params.params: The parameters for the new token

newTokenV3((string,string,string,uint8,b.details: Similar to newTokenV2 but with extension support. Extension hooks will be called if extensionID is non-zero

params.params: The parameters for the new token including extension configuration

returns.token: The address of the created token

newTokenV4((string,string,string,uint8,b.details: Similar to newTokenV3 but with DEX ID and LP fee profile support. Allows specifying preferred DEX and fee tier

params.params: The parameters for the new token including DEX ID and LP fee profile

returns.token: The address of the created token

newTokenV5((string,string,string,uint8,b.details: Similar to newTokenV4 but with support for FlapTaxTokenV2 when taxRate > 0.      When taxRate is 0, behaves like newTokenV4 (uses regular token or FlapTaxToken).      When taxRate > 0, creates a FlapTaxTokenV2 with advanced tax distribution features. FIXME: this is not enabled in this version. Will be available once the audit for this part is ready.

params.params: The parameters for the new token including advanced tax features

returns.token: The address of the created token

newTokenV6((string,string,string,uint8,b.details: Dispatch logic based on `params.tokenVersion`:   TOKEN_V2_PERMIT (non-tax token):     - buyTaxRate and sellTaxRate MUST both be 0.     - commissionReceiver MUST be address(0).     - Dispatched to PortalLauncherV5 → creates a standard ERC-20 (TOKEN_V2_PERMIT).   TOKEN_TAXED (V1 tax token):     - At least one tax rate must be > 0.     - buyTaxRate MUST equal sellTaxRate (symmetric rates only).     - mktBps MUST be 10000 (all tax goes to beneficiary after protocol fee).     - dividendBps MUST be 0; deflationBps and lpBps MUST be 0.     - commissionReceiver MUST be address(0) (commission not supported).     - Dispatched to PortalLauncherV5Tax → creates a FlapTaxToken (TOKEN_TAXED).   TOKEN_TAXED_V2 (V2 tax token):     - At least one tax rate must be > 0.     - buyTaxRate MUST equal sellTaxRate (symmetric rates only via V5 path).     - mktBps MUST NOT be 10000 (use TOKEN_TAXED for that case).     - mktBps + deflationBps + dividendBps + lpBps MUST equal 10000.     - commissionReceiver MUST be address(0) (commission not supported).     - Dispatched to PortalLauncherV5Tax → creates a FlapTaxTokenV2 (TOKEN_TAXED_V2).   TOKEN_TAXED_V3 (V3 tax token):     - At least one tax rate must be > 0.     - Asymmetric rates allowed (buyTaxRate != sellTaxRate is OK).     - mktBps + deflationBps + dividendBps + lpBps MUST equal 10000.     - mktBps == 10000 IS allowed (all tax → protocol fee + commission, no marketing).     - commissionReceiver CAN be non-zero (commission supported).     - Dispatched to PortalLauncherTaxV3.launchTaxTokenV3 → creates a FlapTaxTokenV3 (TOKEN_TAXED_V3). Emits FlapTokenTaxSet (with max rate) AND FlapTokenAsymmetricTaxSet for tax tokens.

params.params: The parameters for the new token (see NewTokenV6Params).

returns.token: The address of the created token.

params.eth: The amount of ETH to spend
params.token: The address of the token to buy

returns.amount: The amount of tokens to buy

params.dstToken: The address of the token to receive
params.srcAmount: The amount of srcToken to redeem
params.srcToken: The address of the token to redeem

returns.dstAmount: The amount of dstToken to receive

params.amount: The amount of tokens to sell
params.token: The address of the token to sell

returns.eth: The amount of ETH to receive

quoteExactInput((address,address,uint256.details: refer to the swapExactInput method for the scenarios

recoverStuckDividend((address,uint256,ad.details: Only callable by AUDITOR_ROLE. The Dividend contract for each entry is resolved from the      tax token via `dividendContract()`, and the recovered token is `Dividend.dividendToken()`.      Each Dividend contract must be owned by this Portal, otherwise the inner `emergencyWithdraw` call reverts.

recoverStuckTaxToken(address).details: Only callable by AUDITOR_ROLE. Currently supports V1 (TOKEN_TAXED) tax tokens.      The name is intentionally generic to allow extension to V2/V3 tax tokens in the future.

params.taxToken: The address of the V1 tax token to recover stuck tokens for

params.dstToken: The address of the token to receive
params.srcAmount: The amount of srcToken to redeem
params.srcToken: The address of the token to redeem

returns.dstAmount: The amount of dstToken to receive

registerExtension(bytes32,address,uint8).details: Only callable by the default admin

params.extensionAddress: The address of the extension contract
params.extensionId: The unique identifier for this extension
params.version: The version of the extension interface it implements (starting from 1)

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `account`.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role.

params.amount: The amount of tokens to sell
params.minEth: The minimum amount of ETH to receive
params.token: The address of the token to sell

setBitFlags(uint256).details: Can only be called with DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE

setFeeExemption(address[],bool).details: Only callable by the default admin

params.isExempted: Whether the traders should be exempted from fees
params.traders: The addresses of the traders to set exemption for

setFlapFeeProfile(address,uint8).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE or TOKEN_FLAP_FEE_SETTER_ROLE

setQuoteTokenConfiguration(address,(uint.details: Only callable by the default admin

params.config: The configuration struct for the quote token
params.quoteToken: The address of the quote token

setSpammerBlockedBatch(address[],bool).details: Only callable by the default admin or MODERATOR_ROLE

params.blocked: True to block, false to unblock
params.spammers: The addresses to block or unblock

setTokenDividendToken(address,address).details: Only callable by TAX_GUARDIAN_ROLE or DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE.      Any undistributed dividends accrued under the previous token should be distributed      (or recovered via recoverStuckDividend) before calling this function.      When dividendBps == 0, the Dividend contract still has its token updated (share tracking only).

params.newDividendToken: The new dividend token address (must be non-zero).
params.taxToken: The tax token address whose dividend token should be updated.

stageNewTokenV5((uint8,bytes32,bool,uint.details: This stages a token by validating parameters and reserving the token address.      The token contract is not deployed yet. Call commitNewTokenV5 to actually deploy it.      Extensions are not supported in two-step launch. LP fee profile is always STANDARD. FIXME: this is not enabled in this version. Will be available once the audit for this part is ready.

params.params: The immutable parameters for the new token

returns.token: The predetermined address of the token

swapExactInput((address,address,uint256,.details: Here are some possible scenarios:   If the token's reserve is BNB or ETH (i.e: the quote token is the native gas token):      - BUY: input token is address(0), output token is the token address      - SELL: input token is the token address, output token is address(0)   If the token's reserve is another ERC20 token (eg. USD*, i.e, the quote token is an ERC20 token):      - BUY with USD*: input token is the USD* address, output token is the token address      - SELL for USD*: input token is the token address, output token is the USD* address      - BUY with BNB or ETH: input token is address(0), output token is the token address.        (Note: this requires an internal swap to convert BNB/ETH to USD*, nativeToQuoteSwap must be anabled for this quote token) Note: Currently, this method supports trading tokens that is either still on the bonding curve or already listed on DEX.

returns.outputAmount: The amount of output token received

swapExactInputV3((address,address,uint25.details: Similar to swapExactInput but with extension support. Extension hooks will be called if the token uses an extension

params.params: The swap parameters including extension data

returns.outputAmount: The amount of output token received

updateTaxTokenAddresses((address,address.details: Only callable by the default admin, TAX_MANAGER_ROLE, or TAX_GUARDIAN_ROLE

params.updates: Array of TaxTokenAddressUpdate structs containing token addresses and new addresses

addV4LPLiquidity(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Add liquidity to locked V4/PCS Infinity LP positions for a token.

auditorRunIdempotent().notice: Run a one-time (idempotent) set of hotfixes authored by the auditor team.

burnStuckTaxToken(address).notice: Burn stuck tax tokens by sweeping them from the tax splitter and sending to the dead address

buyOnCreation(address,address,uint256).notice: Buy token with ETH on creation

changeMarketWallet(address,address).notice: Changes the market wallet (TaxProcessor.marketAddress) for a TOKEN_TAXED_V2 or TOKEN_TAXED_V3 token.

excludeAddressFromDividends(address,addr.notice: Exclude an address from receiving dividends for a V2/V3 tax token.

getFeeRate().notice: Get the current buy and sell fee rates

getLockedSaltsByUserAndVersion(address,u.notice: Paginated enumeration of salts locked by a user for a specific token version.

getLockedSaltsCountByUserAndVersion(addr.notice: Get the total number of salts locked by a user for a specific token version in the on-chain index.

getLocks(address).notice: get the locks by token address

getQuoteTokenConfiguration(address).notice: Get the quote token configuration for a given quote token address
